{"slots":{"0":{"name":"screen","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"1":{"name":"databank","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"2":{"name":"receiver","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"3":{"name":"emitter","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-1":{"name":"unit","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-2":{"name":"construct","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-3":{"name":"player","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-4":{"name":"system","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}},"-5":{"name":"library","type":{"events":[],"methods":[]}}},"handlers":[{"code":"--library.onStart()\nfunction ParsePos(s)\n  if not s or s==\"\" then return nil end\n  local w,b,x,y,z = s:match(\"::pos{(%d+),(%d+),([-%.%d]+),([-%.%d]+),([-%.%d]+)}\")\n  if x then return {w=tonumber(w),b=tonumber(b),x=tonumber(x),y=tonumber(y),z=tonumber(z)} end\n  return nil\nend\n\nfunction Trim(s) return (s or \"\"):match(\"^%s*(.-)%s*$\") end\n\nfunction SetStatus(msg, dur)\n  StatusMsg    = msg\n  StatusExpiry = os.clock() + (dur or 5)\n  system.print(\"[BASE] \" .. msg)\nend\n--","filter":{"args":[],"signature":"onStart()","slotKey":"-5"},"key":"0"},{"code":"--unit.onStart()\nlocal VERSION   = \"v1.1.0\"\nBaseChannel     = \"NavBase\" --export: Channel ships use to reach this base\nWaypointList    = {}\nStatusMsg       = \"\"\nStatusExpiry    = 0\nScrollWP        = 0\nSelectedWP      = \"\"\nClearConfirm    = false\nSendQueue       = {}\nSendIndex       = 1\nSending         = false\n\n-- ── Data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nfunction LoadData()\n  if not databank then WaypointList={} return end\n  local raw = databank.getStringValue(\"waypoints\")\n  WaypointList = (raw~=nil and raw~=\"\") and json.decode(raw) or {}\nend\n\nfunction SaveData()\n  if not databank then return end\n  databank.setStringValue(\"waypoints\", json.encode(WaypointList))\nend\n\nfunction AddWP(name, posStr)\n  for _,wp in ipairs(WaypointList) do\n    if wp.n:lower()==name:lower() then\n      SetStatus(\"'\"..name..\"' already exists. Delete first.\")\n      return false\n    end\n  end\n  table.insert(WaypointList, {n=name, c=posStr})\n  table.sort(WaypointList, function(a,b) return a.n:lower()<b.n:lower() end)\n  SaveData()\n  SetStatus(\"Added: \"..name)\n  return true\nend\n\nfunction DelWP(name)\n  for i,wp in ipairs(WaypointList) do\n    if wp.n:lower()==name:lower() then\n      table.remove(WaypointList, i)\n      if SelectedWP==wp.n then SelectedWP=\"\" end\n      SaveData()\n      SetStatus(\"Deleted: \"..name)\n      return true\n    end\n  end\n  SetStatus(\"Not found: \"..name)\n  return false\nend\n\n-- ── Send WPs to a requesting ship ────────────────────────────\nfunction StartSendToShip(shipID)\n  SendQueue = {}\n  for _,wp in ipairs(WaypointList) do table.insert(SendQueue, wp) end\n  SendIndex = 1\n  Sending   = true\n  emitter.send(BaseChannel, \"<SyncCount>\"..#SendQueue)\n  unit.setTimer(\"send_tick\", 0.3)\n  SetStatus(\"Sending \"..#SendQueue..\" WPs to \"..shipID)\nend\n\n-- ── Screen builder ────────────────────────────────────────────\nfunction DrawScreen()\n  if not screen then return end\n  screen.setRenderScript(BuildScreenScript())\nend\n\nfunction BuildScreenScript()\n  local wpEnc = json.encode(WaypointList):gsub('\"', \"@@@\")\n  local S = {}\n\n  S[1] = string.format([[\nlocal json=require('dkjson')\nlocal Cell=32\nlocal ScrW,ScrH=1024,576\nlocal ScrollWP=%d\nlocal SelWP=%q\nlocal StatusMsg=%q\nlocal _w=%q\nlocal WP=json.decode(_w:gsub(\"@@@\",'\"')) or {}\n]], ScrollWP, SelectedWP, StatusMsg, wpEnc)\n\n  S[2] = [[\nlocal Lbg =createLayer()\nlocal Lpnl=createLayer()\nlocal Lln =createLayer()\nlocal Lbtn=createLayer()\nlocal Lsel=createLayer()\nlocal Ltxt=createLayer()\nlocal Ltit=createLayer()\nlocal Lst =createLayer()\nlocal cx,cy=getCursor()\nlocal pr=getCursorPressed()\nlocal Out=\"\"\nlocal fTxt=loadFont(\"Montserrat-Light\",18)\nlocal fTit=loadFont(\"Montserrat-Light\",22)\nlocal fSm =loadFont(\"Montserrat-Light\",13)\n\nsetDefaultFillColor(Ltxt,Shape_Text,0.82,0.82,0.82,1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Ltit,Shape_Text,1.0, 0.86,0.0, 1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Lsel,Shape_Text,0.0, 0.87,1.0, 1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Lst, Shape_Text,1.0, 0.78,0.2, 1)\nsetDefaultStrokeColor(Lln,Shape_Line,0.15,0.32,0.62,0.7)\nsetDefaultStrokeWidth(Lln,Shape_Line,1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Lbtn, Shape_BoxRounded,0.0, 0.16,0.55,0.9)\nsetDefaultStrokeColor(Lbtn,Shape_BoxRounded,0.32,0.50,0.87,1.0)\nsetDefaultStrokeWidth(Lbtn,Shape_BoxRounded,1)\nsetNextFillColor(Lbg,0,0.008,0.04,1)\naddBox(Lbg,0,0,ScrW,ScrH)\n\nlocal function Btn(txt,x,y,w,h,enabled)\n  local hov=(cx>=x and cx<x+w and cy>=y and cy<y+h)\n  if not enabled then\n    setNextFillColor(Lbtn,0.07,0.07,0.15,0.6)\n    setNextStrokeColor(Lbtn,0.20,0.20,0.30,0.5)\n    addBoxRounded(Lbtn,x,y,w,h,4)\n    setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.30,0.30,0.40,1)\n    setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n    addText(Ltxt,fTxt,txt,x+w/2,y+h/2)\n    return false\n  elseif hov then\n    setNextFillColor(Lbtn,0.0,0.31,0.78,1)\n    setNextStrokeColor(Lbtn,0.4,0.63,1.0,1)\n    addBoxRounded(Lbtn,x,y,w,h,4)\n    setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n    addText(Ltxt,fTxt,txt,x+w/2,y+h/2)\n  else\n    addBoxRounded(Lbtn,x,y,w,h,4)\n    setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n    addText(Ltxt,fTxt,txt,x+w/2,y+h/2)\n  end\n  return hov and pr\nend\n]]\n\n  S[3] = [[\n-- Header\nsetNextFillColor(Lpnl,0,0.04,0.16,1)\nsetNextStrokeColor(Lpnl,0.15,0.32,0.62,0.8)\nsetNextStrokeWidth(Lpnl,1)\naddBox(Lpnl,0,0,ScrW,Cell)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltit,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltit,fTit,\"◄ PERSONAL BASE v1.1 ►\",8,Cell/2)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltit,AlignH_Right,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltit,fTit,\"WPs: \"..#WP,ScrW-8,Cell/2)\naddLine(Lln,0,Cell,ScrW,Cell)\n\n-- WP list panel\nsetNextFillColor(Lpnl,0,0.04,0.14,0.9)\naddBox(Lpnl,0,Cell,Cell*22,Cell)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltit,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltit,fTit,\"STORED WAYPOINTS\",Cell*11,Cell+Cell/2)\naddLine(Lln,0,Cell*2,Cell*22,Cell*2)\naddLine(Lln,Cell*22,Cell,Cell*22,ScrH-Cell)\n\nlocal visWP=14\nlocal maxSWP=math.max(0,#WP-visWP)\nlocal sCWP=math.max(0,math.min(ScrollWP,maxSWP))\nfor i=1,visWP do\n  local idx=i+sCWP\n  if idx>#WP then break end\n  local wp=WP[idx]\n  local ry=Cell*2+(i-1)*Cell\n  local sel=(wp.n==SelWP)\n  local hov=(cx>=0 and cx<Cell*22 and cy>=ry and cy<ry+Cell)\n  if sel then\n    setNextFillColor(Lpnl,0.0,0.59,0.86,0.22)\n    setNextStrokeColor(Lpnl,0.0,0.78,1.0,0.9)\n    setNextStrokeWidth(Lpnl,1)\n    addBox(Lpnl,0,ry,Cell*22,Cell)\n  elseif hov then\n    setNextFillColor(Lpnl,1,1,1,0.04)\n    addBox(Lpnl,0,ry,Cell*22,Cell)\n  end\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.30,0.35,0.50,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Right,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Ltxt,fSm,idx..\".\",Cell,ry+Cell/2)\n  local L=(sel or hov) and Lsel or Ltxt\n  if sel then setNextFillColor(Lsel,0.0,0.87,1.0,1) end\n  setNextTextAlign(L,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(L,fTxt,wp.n,Cell+6,ry+Cell/2)\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.50,0.50,0.65,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Ltxt,fSm,wp.c,Cell*9,ry+Cell/2)\n  addLine(Lln,0,ry+Cell,Cell*22,ry+Cell)\n  if hov and pr then Out=json.encode({\"sel\",wp.n}) end\nend\n\nif #WP>visWP then\n  local sbX=Cell*22-6\n  local sbYs=Cell*2+2\n  local sbH=visWP*Cell-4\n  local tH=math.max(16,sbH*(visWP/#WP))\n  local tY=sbYs+(sbH-tH)*(sCWP/math.max(1,maxSWP))\n  setNextFillColor(Lln,0.1,0.22,0.44,0.5)\n  addBox(Lln,sbX,sbYs,5,sbH)\n  setNextFillColor(Lln,0.0,0.63,1.0,0.8)\n  addBox(Lln,sbX,tY,5,tH)\nend\n\n-- Action buttons\nlocal bX=Cell*23\nlocal bW=ScrW-bX-8\nlocal bH=Cell-6\nlocal bGap=6\nlocal bY=Cell*2+bGap\nif Btn(\"✕  REMOVE SELECTED\",bX,bY,bW,bH,SelWP~=\"\") then Out=json.encode({\"del\",SelWP})   end; bY=bY+bH+bGap\nif Btn(\"⚠  CLEAR ALL\",      bX,bY,bW,bH,true)      then Out=json.encode({\"clear_all\"})   end\n]]\n\n  S[4] = [[\n-- Footer\naddLine(Lln,0,ScrH-Cell,ScrW,ScrH-Cell)\nsetNextFillColor(Lpnl,0,0.02,0.08,0.95)\naddBox(Lpnl,0,ScrH-Cell,ScrW,Cell)\nif StatusMsg~=\"\" then\n  setNextTextAlign(Lst,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Lst,fTxt,StatusMsg,ScrW/2,ScrH-Cell/2)\nelse\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.31,0.31,0.47,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Ltxt,fSm,\"Personal waypoint store  |  Ships sync on: NavBase  |  Lua chat: help\",ScrW/2,ScrH-Cell/2)\nend\nsetOutput(Out)\nrequestAnimationFrame(1)\n]]\n  return table.concat(S)\nend\n\n-- ── Init ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nLoadData()\nif screen   then screen.activate() end\nif receiver then receiver.setChannelList({BaseChannel}) end\nunit.setTimer(\"base_tick\", 1)\nsystem.print(\"=== Personal Base \"..VERSION..\" ===\")\nsystem.print(\"Channel: \"..BaseChannel..\"  |  WPs: \"..#WaypointList)\nDrawScreen()\n--","filter":{"args":[],"signature":"onStart()","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"1"},{"code":"--unit.onStop()\nif screen then screen.setCenteredText(\"Personal Base\") end\n--","filter":{"args":[],"signature":"onStop()","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"2"},{"code":"--unit.onTimer(tag)\nif StatusMsg~=\"\" and os.clock()>StatusExpiry then StatusMsg=\"\" end\nDrawScreen()\n--","filter":{"args":[{"value":"base_tick"}],"signature":"onTimer(tag)","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"3"},{"code":"--unit.onTimer(tag)\nif not Sending then return end\nif SendIndex > #SendQueue then\n  emitter.send(BaseChannel, \"<SyncComplete>\")\n  Sending = false\n  SetStatus(\"Send complete: \"..(SendIndex-1)..\" WPs\")\n  return\nend\nlocal wp = SendQueue[SendIndex]\nlocal d  = json.encode({n=wp.n, c=wp.c}):gsub('\"', \"@@@\")\nemitter.send(BaseChannel, \"<SyncWP>\"..d)\nSendIndex = SendIndex + 1\n--","filter":{"args":[{"value":"send_tick"}],"signature":"onTimer(tag)","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"4"},{"code":"--screen.onMouseUp(x,y)\nlocal raw = screen.getScriptOutput()\nif not raw or raw==\"\" then return end\nlocal ok, data = pcall(json.decode, raw)\nif not ok or type(data)~=\"table\" then return end\nlocal act, p1 = data[1], data[2]\nif     act==\"sel\"       then SelectedWP = (SelectedWP==p1 and \"\" or p1)\nelseif act==\"del\"       then DelWP(p1)\nelseif act==\"clear_all\" then\n  if ClearConfirm then\n    WaypointList = {}; SaveData()\n    ClearConfirm = false\n    SetStatus(\"All waypoints cleared\")\n  else\n    ClearConfirm = true\n    SetStatus(\"Type 'confirm' in Lua chat to clear ALL waypoints.\", 10)\n  end\nend\nDrawScreen()\n--","filter":{"args":[{"variable":"*"},{"variable":"*"}],"signature":"onMouseUp(x,y)","slotKey":"0"},"key":"5"},{"code":"--receiver.onReceived(channel,message)\n-- Ship requesting a sync download\nif message:find(\"<RequestSync>\", 1, true) then\n  local shipID = message:gsub(\"<RequestSync>\", \"\")\n  system.print(\"[BASE] Sync request from: \"..shipID)\n  StartSendToShip(shipID)\n  return\nend\n\n-- Ship pushing a WP up to base\nif message:find(\"<PushWP>\", 1, true) then\n  local raw = message:gsub(\"<PushWP>\", \"\"):gsub(\"@@@\", '\"')\n  local ok, wp = pcall(json.decode, raw)\n  if ok and wp and wp.n and wp.c then\n    local found = false\n    for i,e in ipairs(WaypointList) do\n      if e.n:lower()==wp.n:lower() then WaypointList[i].c=wp.c; found=true; break end\n    end\n    if not found then table.insert(WaypointList, {n=wp.n, c=wp.c}) end\n    table.sort(WaypointList, function(a,b) return a.n:lower()<b.n:lower() end)\n    SaveData()\n    SetStatus(\"Received WP from ship: \"..wp.n)\n  end\n  DrawScreen()\nend\n--","filter":{"args":[{"variable":"*"},{"variable":"*"}],"signature":"onReceived(channel,message)","slotKey":"2"},"key":"6"},{"code":"--system.onInputText(text)\nlocal t  = Trim(text)\nlocal lo = t:lower()\n\nif lo==\"help\" then\n  system.print(\"═══ PERSONAL BASE COMMANDS ═══\")\n  system.print(\"add NAME ::pos{..}  add waypoint\")\n  system.print(\"del NAME            delete waypoint\")\n  system.print(\"list                list all waypoints\")\n  system.print(\"clear               clear all (requires confirm)\")\n  system.print(\"confirm             confirm a pending clear\")\n  return\nend\n\nlocal addN, addC = t:match(\"^[Aa][Dd][Dd]%s+(%S+)%s*(.*)\")\nif addN then\n  addC = Trim(addC)\n  if addC==\"\" then\n    SetStatus(\"Coords required. Use: add NAME ::pos{0,0,x,y,z}\")\n  elseif ParsePos(addC) then\n    AddWP(addN, addC)\n  else\n    SetStatus(\"Bad coords format. Use ::pos{0,0,x,y,z}\")\n  end\n  DrawScreen(); return\nend\n\nlocal delN = t:match(\"^[Dd][Ee][Ll]%s+(.+)\")\nif delN then DelWP(Trim(delN)); DrawScreen(); return end\n\nif lo==\"list\" then\n  system.print(\"─── PERSONAL WAYPOINTS (\"..#WaypointList..\") ───\")\n  for i,wp in ipairs(WaypointList) do\n    system.print(i..\".  \"..wp.n..\"  \"..wp.c)\n  end\n  return\nend\n\nif lo==\"clear\" then\n  ClearConfirm = true\n  SetStatus(\"Type 'confirm' to clear ALL waypoints. Cannot be undone.\", 10)\n  DrawScreen(); return\nend\n\nif lo==\"confirm\" then\n  if ClearConfirm then\n    WaypointList = {}; SaveData()\n    ClearConfirm = false\n    SetStatus(\"All waypoints cleared\")\n    DrawScreen()\n  else\n    SetStatus(\"Nothing to confirm.\")\n  end\n  return\nend\n\nSetStatus(\"Unknown command '\"..lo..\"'  —  type 'help'\")\n--","filter":{"args":[{"variable":"*"}],"signature":"onInputText(text)","slotKey":"-4"},"key":"7"}],"methods":[],"events":[]}
